data.title: feat: bin/ — shared executables for agent home
data.description:
## Summary

Shared binaries/scripts available to all agents in the household — on PATH or invoked directly.

## What

```
bin/
├── skogai-cli        # main SkogAI CLI entrypoint
├── skogai-parse      # message routing / operator parsing
├── skogai-todo       # todo management
├── skogai-queue      # task queue operations
├── skogai-worktree   # worktree helpers
└── ...               # other shared tools
```

## Notes

* These are literally shared executables — the equivalent of `/usr/local/bin` for the skogai household
* Distinct from project-local `bin/` (that's project-specific tooling)
* Should be usable by any agent without project context
